corpus.text:
Title: RolePilot
Category: Full-Stack AI Product
Description: Built a full-stack AI career platform that helps users track job applications, analyze resumes, compare resumes against job postings, retrieve relevant project evidence, generate grounded tailored resume content, and export polished drafts.
Skills: React, Next.js, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, pgvector, OpenAI API, TypeScript, Python, Cloudflare Workers
Keywords: RAG, semantic retrieval, resume tailoring, REST APIs, AI agent, application tracking

Title: RolePilot
Category: Full-Stack AI Product
Bullet: Built a full-stack AI career platform with 5 REST API workflows and a PostgreSQL backend storing application records, resume drafts, and chunked embeddings for RAG retrieval.

Title: RolePilot
Category: Full-Stack AI Product
Bullet: Achieved 80% top-3 retrieval accuracy across 30 job descriptions using a pgvector-based semantic search pipeline over chunked project evidence.

Title: RolePilot
Category: Full-Stack AI Product
Bullet: Reduced unsupported LLM-generated claims by grounding resume tailoring outputs in retrieved evidence, improving factual consistency.

Title: RolePilot
Category: Full-Stack AI Product
Bullet: Enabled stateful multi-turn career guidance across extended conversations by implementing a Cloudflare Workers-based agent with persistent memory.

Title: HeatRisk AI
Category: Machine Learning + Full Stack
Description: Developed a county heat risk platform that scores 72-hour public health danger from live weather, AQI, and vulnerability inputs and serves real-time risk outputs across U.S. counties.
Skills: Python, FastAPI, Next.js, pandas, scikit-learn, TypeScript
Keywords: supervised learning, forecasting, public health, real-time scoring, deployment, county analytics

Title: HeatRisk AI
Category: Machine Learning + Full Stack
Bullet: Built a supervised learning pipeline over 29,376 county-day samples and 468 historical heat events, engineering forecast, AQI, SVI, and interaction features for emergency pattern detection.

Title: HeatRisk AI
Category: Machine Learning + Full Stack
Bullet: Improved event detection F1 8.8x over a rule-based baseline, achieving 0.685 F1 and 0.985 ROC AUC with a Random Forest model.

Title: HeatRisk AI
Category: Machine Learning + Full Stack
Bullet: Deployed a FastAPI and Next.js application serving real-time heat risk scores for more than 3,000 U.S. counties with severity tiers, driver breakdowns, and county-specific guidance.

Title: Divergence 2 Percent Research Lab
Category: Applied Machine Learning Research
Bullet: Improved TTS training coherence by building contextual input formatting scripts for Dia model fine-tuning with Hugging Face Trainer.

Title: Divergence 2 Percent Research Lab
Category: Applied Machine Learning Research
Bullet: Increased model coverage by building a 33-hour voice dataset via web scraping with BeautifulSoup and audio processing with librosa.

Title: Divergence 2 Percent Research Lab
Category: Applied Machine Learning Research
Bullet: Benchmarked production TTS models on more than 100 test samples and automated multi-metric evaluation across MOS, WER, and speaker similarity.

Title: Pac-Man FPGA Project
Category: FPGA / Embedded Systems
Description: Built a Pac-Man style game in SystemVerilog on FPGA with HDMI output, keyboard input, sprite logic, game state handling, and module debugging in Vivado.
Skills: SystemVerilog, FPGA, Vivado, HDMI, debugging
Keywords: embedded systems, hardware validation, digital logic, low-level debugging

Title: Pac-Man FPGA Project
Category: FPGA / Embedded Systems
Bullet: Debugged and integrated game modules including movement, sprites, collisions, and display logic in Vivado, strengthening low-level hardware design and validation experience.

Title: CS124 Tutor
Category: Teaching / Software Fundamentals
Description: Guided students through object-oriented programming, debugging, and core software engineering reasoning in a large introductory Java course.
Skills: Java, Debugging, OOP, Communication, Teaching
Keywords: software fundamentals, debugging, mentoring, technical communication

Title: CS124 Tutor
Category: Teaching / Software Fundamentals
Bullet: Guided 50+ students weekly on object-oriented design and debugging across a 600-student introductory CS Java course.

application.role_title: Summer 2026 Internship Program - Command and Data Handling (CDH)
application.ai_summary: Spacecraft electrical systems internship focused on hardware design, troubleshooting, avionics-style command and data handling, and reliability-minded engineering.
application.job_description: Contribute to command and data handling work across spacecraft electrical systems, testing, troubleshooting, and reliability-oriented hardware decisions.

application.ai_summary: Firmware internship working on optical transceivers, peripheral drivers, evaluation boards, circuit analysis, and embedded troubleshooting.
application.job_description: Develop firmware and peripheral drivers, work with MCU evaluation boards, troubleshoot embedded behavior, and communicate results clearly with the team.

application.role_title: UIUC Research Park Intern - Low Voltage Electronics
application.ai_summary: Hands-on electronics internship focused on testing, automation, scripting, firmware-adjacent debugging, and evaluation of sensing systems.
application.job_description: Support hardware evaluation with instrumentation, scripting, debugging, and iterative testing for low-voltage electronics and sensing systems.

application.ai_summary: Electrical engineering internship focused on prototyping, bring-up, debugging, validation, and scripting for low-voltage electronics.
application.job_description: Prototype and validate electronic systems, work with lab tools, and debug low-level hardware issues across sensing and power subsystems.

application.ai_summary: Internship focused on tooling and pipelines for autonomous vehicle perception data, data mining strategies, ML-driven curation, and developer experience.
application.job_description: Build and scale data mining strategies, integrate ML-driven curation techniques like embedding-based search, and improve tooling around perception data pipelines.

application.ai_summary: Software internship supporting ML tooling, scientific workflows, and large-scale data infrastructure for drug discovery.
application.job_description: Build software tools around ML workflows, collaborate with ML engineers, and help scale data systems that support computational research.

application.ai_summary: Machine learning internship focused on end-to-end ML workflows, production problem formulation, Python, and deploying ML solutions at consumer scale.
application.job_description: Design and implement ML algorithms, collaborate with senior engineers, and build deployable ML solutions that improve product experience at large scale.

application.ai_summary: ML engineering internship focused on robust training, deployment, and monitoring pipelines for deep learning systems.
application.job_description: Develop, test, and deploy machine learning systems with strong engineering discipline, and focus on training, deployment, and monitoring at scale.

application.ai_summary: Firmware internship for advanced hardware systems requiring embedded software, custom PCB interaction, and instrumentation-based debugging.
required_skills: development kits or custom PCB hardware
application.job_description: Write and debug embedded software for new modules and sensors, work with embedded development kits or custom PCB hardware, and use tools like oscilloscopes and logic analyzers.

application.ai_summary: Firmware internship at the intersection of robotics, hardware, software, and AI for autonomous construction equipment.
application.job_description: Work on firmware and complex systems at the intersection of hardware, software, and AI for autonomous robotics products.

application.ai_summary: Hardware internship for electronics design, schematic capture, PCB layout, bring-up, debugging, and lab instrumentation.
preferred_skills: digital or power or analog circuit design
application.job_description: Design and build electronics hardware, support bring-up and debugging, and use lab instruments for validation in a hardware-focused internship.

application.ai_summary: Backend internship to build product infrastructure and large-scale systems for a consumer application.
application.job_description: Build backend systems that support large-scale product experiences and collaborate on infrastructure and product engineering at scale.

application.ai_summary: Cloud infrastructure internship for systems that support large-scale consumer applications.
application.job_description: Work on infrastructure and platform systems that support high-scale consumer applications and engineering velocity.

application.ai_summary: Frontend internship building user-facing experiences in Next.js and TypeScript in a generative AI product environment.
application.job_description: Build product-facing web experiences in Next.js and TypeScript, own UI architecture, and partner with AI, product, and design teams.

application.ai_summary: Data platform internship for scalable pipelines, data models, Spark, and Airflow-based orchestration.
application.job_description: Build and maintain scalable data models and pipelines that support analytics and decision-making on a modern data platform.

application.ai_summary: Data platform internship focused on backend feature ownership, SQL, ETL/ELT, Python, and schema design.
application.job_description: Design schemas, build Python backend features, and work on ETL/ELT and data platform systems using microservices and relational databases.

application.ai_summary: R&D software internship at the intersection of AI, security, cloud infrastructure, and data.
application.job_description: Work with engineers and data scientists on software problems involving AI, security, cloud infrastructure, and data systems.

application.role_title: Full Stack Software Engineer - Python, React
application.ai_summary: Full-stack role using Python/FastAPI and TypeScript/React to ship user features, AI agents, and personalization systems.
application.job_description: Ship full-stack features, build Python/FastAPI services, build modern React UI, and develop AI agents and automation workflows.

application.ai_summary: Software engineering internship building product features for data-intensive platforms used by technical operators at scale.
application.job_description: Contribute directly to software products that transform how organizations use data, with a focus on product engineering and high-quality code.

application.ai_summary: Perception ML internship focused on dataset creation, training pipelines, metrics, vision-language models, and large-scale multimodal systems.
application.job_description: Develop advanced ML models, work with large-scale multimodal data, and improve perception systems through training, evaluation, and dataset work.

application.ai_summary: Embedded systems role across Linux, firmware, device drivers, communication interfaces, and hardware/software debugging for robotics hardware.
application.job_description: Develop embedded systems across firmware and application layers, work with communication protocols and debugging tools, and diagnose issues across hardware and software.

application.ai_summary: Frontend role using Next.js, React, TypeScript, FastAPI integration, testing, and intelligent UI experiences.
application.job_description: Build Next.js frontends, integrate with FastAPI services, implement data fetching and error handling, and collaborate with backend and AI teams.

application.ai_summary: Frontend internship for complex data-dense interfaces, backend API integration, and component/design system work.
application.job_description: Integrate frontend components with backend APIs and real-time data sources while contributing to tooling, component libraries, and design system foundations.
